org.apache.juneau.commons.svl

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    <T> VarResolver.Builder
    VarResolver.Builder.bean(Class<T> c, T value)
    Adds a bean to the resolved VarResolver's local bean store.
    VarResolver.Builder
    VarResolver.copy()
    Returns a new builder object using the settings in this resolver as a base.
    static VarResolver.Builder
    VarResolver.create()
    Instantiates a new clean-slate VarResolver.Builder object.
    VarResolver.Builder
    VarResolver.Builder.defaultFunctions()
    Registers the built-in VarFunction catalog plus any third-party functions discovered via ServiceLoader.load(Class) on VarFunction.
    VarResolver.Builder
    VarResolver.Builder.defaultVars()
    Adds the default variables to this builder.
    final VarResolver.Builder
    VarResolver.Builder.functions(Class<? extends VarFunction>... values)
    Register one or more VarFunction classes on this builder.
    VarResolver.Builder
    VarResolver.Builder.functions(VarFunction... values)
    Register one or more VarFunction instances on this builder.
    final VarResolver.Builder
    VarResolver.Builder.vars(Class<? extends Var>... values)
    Register new variables with this resolver.
    VarResolver.Builder
    VarResolver.Builder.vars(Var... values)
    Register new variables with this resolver.
    VarResolver.Builder
    VarResolver.Builder.vars(VarList values)
    Register new variables with this resolver.
